zh.lifeSummary: 當Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan於大約1270年出生在英國史洛普爾廷頓時，她的父親Roger Powys Estwick103歲，母親Mrs Roger Powys22歲。她和Phillip Kynaston至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan于大约1270年出生在英国史洛普爾廷頓时，她的父亲Roger Powys Estwick103岁，母亲Mrs Roger Powys22岁。她和Phillip Kynaston至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Vychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Rogeri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan was born about 1270, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, her father, Roger Powys Estwick, was 103 and her mother, Mrs Roger Powys, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Phillip Kynaston.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan est née environ 1270, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Powys Estwick, avait 103 ans et sa mère, Mrs Roger Powys, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Phillip Kynaston.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan um 1270 in Whittington, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Powys Estwick 103 und ihre Mutter Mrs Roger Powys 22. Sie hatte mit Phillip Kynaston mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan è nata il circa 1270 nel Whittington, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Roger Powys Estwick, aveva 103 anni e sua madre, Mrs Roger Powys, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Phillip Kynaston.

ja.lifeSummary: Gweruilla Rogeri Vychanが約1270年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Roger Powys Estwickは103歳，母Mrs Roger Powysは22歳であった。彼女はPhillip Kynastonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Powys Estwick(은)는 103세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Roger Powys(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Phillip Kynaston(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Powys Estwick, tinha 103 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Roger Powys, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Phillip Kynaston.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan родилась около 1270 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Powys Estwick было 103 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Roger Powys, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Phillip Kynaston.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan nació aproximadamente 1270, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Powys Estwick, tenía 103 años y su mamá, Mrs Roger Powys, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Phillip Kynaston.
